name: winreach-mcp
description: Headless PowerShell, screenshots, file transfer, and computer_use on a Windows host, exposed to Claude Desktop over a local stdio MCP server.
long_description: WinReach gives AI agents secure PowerShell access to the Windows host. Claude Desktop extensions launch a LOCAL process, so this extension runs WinReach in stdio mode via `npx -y winreach-mcp --stdio`. A remote WinReach HTTP server cannot itself be a DXT (there is no local process to launch); to connect to a remote WinReach instead, add it as an `mcpServers` entry with a Streamable-HTTP URL and an `Authorization: Bearer` header (see the project README). Provide a WINREACH_TOKEN below, or leave it blank to let WinReach mint an ephemeral in-memory admin token for the session.

tools.name: powershell_send
tools.description: Send a command to an open session.

tools.name: computer_use
tools.description: Drive mouse and keyboard input (when enabled).

tools.name: file_upload
tools.description: Upload a file into the sandbox root (when enabled).

tools.name: file_download
tools.description: Download a file from the sandbox root (when enabled).

winreach_token.title: WinReach bearer token
winreach_token.description: Bearer token for the local admin principal. Leave blank to mint an ephemeral in-memory token. Generate one with: npx winreach-mcp gen-token
